title: Mobile data augmentation engine for personalized on-device deep learning system
abstract: A method includes processing, using at least one processor of an electronic device, each of multiple images using a photometric augmentation engine, where the photometric augmentation engine performs one or more photometric augmentation operations. The method also includes applying, using the at least one processor, multiple layers of a convolutional neural network to each of the images, where each layer generates a corresponding feature map. The method further includes processing, using the at least one processor, at least one of the feature maps using at least one feature augmentation engine between consecutive layers of the multiple layers, where the at least one feature augmentation engine performs one or more feature augmentation operations.
claims: Claims ( 14 ) A method comprising: processing, using at least one processor of an electronic device, each of multiple images using a photometric augmentation engine, the photometric augmentation engine performing one or more photometric augmentation operations; applying, using the at least one processor, multiple layers of a convolutional neural network to each of the images, each layer generating a corresponding feature map; and processing, using the at least one processor, at least one of the feature maps using at least one feature augmentation engine between consecutive layers of the multiple layers, the at least one feature augmentation engine performing one or more feature augmentation operations. The method of Claim 1, wherein: processing the at least one of the feature maps comprises: processing a first feature map generated by a first of the multiple layers of the convolutional neural network using a first feature augmentation engine; and processing a second feature map generated by a second of the multiple layers of the convolutional neural network using a second feature augmentation engine; and the first layer and the second layer are consecutive layers of the convolutional neural network. The method of Claim 1, wherein: processing the at least one of the feature maps comprises: processing a first feature map generated by a first of the multiple layers of the convolutional neural network using a first feature augmentation engine; and randomly skipping processing of a second feature map generated by a second of the multiple layers of the convolutional neural network by a second feature augmentation engine; and the first layer and the second layer are consecutive layers of the convolutional neural network. The method of Claim 1, wherein the one or more photometric augmentation operations are randomly selected from a group of possible photometric augmentation operations comprising two or more of: a hue operation, a saturation operation, a motion blur operation, a gamma operation, a brightness operation, a sensor noise operation, or a contrast operation. The method of Claim 1, wherein the one or more feature augmentation operations are randomly selected from a group of possible feature augmentation operations comprising two or more of: a homography transform operation, a crop operation, a zoom operation, or a flip operation. The method of Claim 5, wherein: the one or more feature augmentation operations comprise the homography transform operation; and the homography transform operation is performed using a homography matrix, the homography matrix comprising one or more randomly-determined values. The method of Claim 1, further comprising: diversifying the images and shuffling the images into different subsets before processing the images using the photometric augmentation engine. An electronic device comprising: at least one memory configured to store multiple images; and at least one processing device configured to: process each of the images using a photometric augmentation engine, the photometric augmentation engine configured to perform one or more photometric augmentation operations; apply multiple layers of a convolutional neural network to each of the images, each layer configured to generate a corresponding feature map; and process at least one of the feature maps using at least one feature augmentation engine between consecutive layers of the multiple layers, the at least one feature augmentation engine configured to perform one or more feature augmentation operations. The electronic device of Claim 8, wherein: a first of the at least one feature augmentation engine is configured to process a first feature map generated by a first of the multiple layers of the convolutional neural network; a second of the at least one feature augmentation engine is configured to process a second feature map generated by a second of the multiple layers of the convolutional neural network; and the first layer and the second layer are consecutive layers of the convolutional neural network. The electronic device of Claim 8, wherein: a first of the at least one feature augmentation engine is configured to process a first feature map generated by a first of the multiple layers of the convolutional neural network; the at least one processor is configured to randomly skip processing of a second feature map generated by a second of the multiple layers of the convolutional neural network by a second feature augmentation engine; and the first layer and the second layer are consecutive layers of the convolutional neural network. The electronic device of Claim 8, wherein the one or more photometric augmentation operations are randomly selected from a group of possible photometric augmentation operations comprising two or more of: a hue operation, a saturation operation, a motion blur operation, a gamma operation, a brightness operation, a sensor noise operation, or a contrast operation. The electronic device of Claim 8, wherein the one or more feature augmentation operations are randomly selected from a group of possible feature augmentation operations comprising two or more of: a homography transform operation, a crop operation, a zoom operation, or a flip operation. The electronic device of Claim 12, wherein: the one or more feature augmentation operations comprise the homography transform operation; and the at least one processing device is configured to perform the homography transform operation using a homography matrix, the homography matrix comprising one or more randomly-determined values. The electronic device of Claim 8, wherein the at least one processing device is further configured to diversify the images and shuffle the images into different subsets before processing the images using the photometric augmentation engine.
